assertions.reason: A real POST to /api/run-progress with a garbage bearer token returned HTTP 500 with {"error":"misconfigured_callback_secret"} instead of the expected HTTP 401 invalid token response.
evidence: bunx convex env get CALLBACK_SIGNING_SECRET -> Environment variable not found.

assertions.reason: CALLBACK_SIGNING_SECRET is missing from the Convex deployment, so a valid heartbeat callback path could not be established on the real API surface.
evidence: bunx convex env get CALLBACK_SIGNING_SECRET -> Environment variable not found.

assertions.reason: A real successful /execute-run round-trip could not be exercised because the callback receiver is misconfigured and the browser launch flow never produced a valid run context.
evidence: bunx convex env get CALLBACK_SIGNING_SECRET -> Environment variable not found.

blockers: The Convex deployment is missing CALLBACK_SIGNING_SECRET, so callback API validation cannot proceed past the misconfigured_callback_secret error.
